meta.title: Visual metadata and app-facing surface descriptors
meta.note: Scores are qualitative studio-style values from 0 to 5. They are intended for filtering and display, not scientific measurement.

scales.textureLevel: 0 = smooth glass, 5 = heavily textured or broken
scales.crackleLevel: 0 = no craze intended, 5 = strong decorative crackle
scales.poolingLevel: 0 = minimal pooling response, 5 = strong pooling and edge break
